age_range.evidence: The target group comprised 8066 adolescents (13–19 years).

countries.evidence: All adolescents aged 13–19 years living in the county of Trøndelag in Norway were invited to participate

fieldwork_year.evidence: The present study was a part of the Trøndelag Health Study (HUNT) [30, 31]. All adolescents aged 13–19 years living in the county of Trøndelag in Norway were invited to participate in the Young-HUNT4 survey (2017–2019), of whom 8066 adolescents participated

sample_size.evidence: A total of 8066 adolescents responded to the survey.
